ab: tucu a masulesulem a qadav, uri tjumaq a ku kaka a tjaljaljak a uqaljay.
ch: 今天傍晚，弟弟就要回家了。
en: My younger brother is going home this evening.

ab: vaik aken katua ku vuvu a sema siyubai a veneli ta kuka, padjulu ta sipakaiv tua ku kaka a tjaljaljak a uqaljay.
ch: 我和奶奶去市場買雞，準備煮好吃的晚餐給弟弟。
en: My grandma and I went to the market to buy chickens and prepared a delicious dinner for my younger brother.

ab: cemalivat amen itua paveliveli ta ljaceng, liav aravac a za namapakaizuazua a nasasanguaq a ljaceng.
ch: 我們經過了菜攤，菜攤有好多新鮮的青菜。
en: We passed the vegetable stand, which had a lot of fresh green vegetables.

ab: naveneli amen tua kabula, qaqilj katua taicav.
ch: 我們買了白菜、山藥和蘿蔔。
en: We bought chinese cabbage, yams and carrots.

ab: maitucu aza paveliveli ta kudamunu a tauki, “qaljemaqem aravac ca u pangudralj katua kutjis. pay veliyu tu kedri!”
ch: 旁邊水果攤的老闆說:「我的鳳梨和桃子很甜。買一些吧!」
en: The owner of the nearby fruit stand said: “My pineapples and peaches are very sweet. Buy some!”

ab: saka nia veli anga ta pangudralj katua kutjis.
cemalivat amen tua puvutjuljan, qivu a tauki, “anema nu veliin? pacuni cu a u kuka kakudralan saka sasanguaq aravac, nu ita tjeluaiday a avelian.”
ch: 我們經過了肉攤，老闆說:「你要買什麼?請看我賣的雞又大又肥，一隻300元。」
en: We passed the meat stall, and the boss said, “What do you want to buy? Today’s chickens are big and fat, and one is 300 NTD.”

ab: pazangal cu aya ti vuvu, saka kivadaq ta tauki tui maqati a papemadjuluin.
ch: 奶奶覺得太貴了，問老闆可不可以便宜一點。
en: Grandma thought it was too expensive and asked the boss if it could be cheaper.

ab: ljakua qivu a tauki, madjulu anga cu, inika maqati anga tja kiluvadan aya.
ch: 但老闆說已經很便宜，不能再減了。
en: But the boss said that it is already very cheap and cannot be reduced any further.

ab: maitucu aza kiljaqediqedi a tauki a qivu, idu veliyu ta ku ciqav, kakudralan sa mamadjuluan.
ch: 隔壁的老闆說，來買我的魚，我的魚又大又便宜。
en: The boss next door said, come and buy my fish, my fish is big and cheap.

ab: ta vililjanga naveneli anga men ta kuka ta ciqaw, saka nia vaik anga a tjumaq a kemesa tua tahandayan a djamay.
ch: 最後我們買了雞也買了魚，回家煮了一桌子的菜。
en: In the end we bought chicken and fish, and went home to cook a table of food.

ab: cuai amen a kiljaljavaljav, masulem anga.
en: After waiting for a long time, it was already dark.

ab: manu pakadinguwa a ku kaka a tjaljaljak a uqaljay, inika maqati anga a pulavai aya i pusivitayan, uri pinutjaivililj anga ku sisatjumaqan aya.
ch: 弟弟打電話回來說，軍隊突然不能放假了，要下一個禮拜日才回來。
en: The younger brother called back and said that the army suddenly couldn’t take a vacation and would not be back until the next Sunday.

ab: na kemesa anga itjen a pakaliav aya ti vuvu, pai tja kanavanga sakamaya a masantalj!
ch: 奶奶說已經煮了這麼多，叫大家一起來吃吧!
en: Grandma said that she has cooked so much, so let’s eat together!

ab: nia djauljen anga sakamaya a nia kaka katua nia qali, saka nia atevetevelj a kaiv.
ch: 我們邀請了親朋好友，一起來享用豐盛的晚餐。
en: We invited friends and family to have a great dinner together.
